name: #248 · c43163043000066e86feafcc5d07948b142cf56c · Karol Wojcik · Consolidate README Quick Start and document shared-vs-separate Playwright traces

newTests.name: Tests for unified step macro with opts map > ui-step and api-step still work as wrappers > ui-step delegates to step with {:screenshots? true}
Tests for unified step macro with opts map > step with {:screenshots? true :http? true} (both) > works with browser and API
Tests for allure-reporter helper functions > inject-markdown-renderer! > is idempotent — spel-md-renderer id appears exactly once after applying twice
Tests for allure-reporter helper functions > inject-markdown-renderer! > coexists with video modal injection
Tests for unified step macro with opts map > step with {:http? true} (api-step equivalent) > works with API response
Tests for allure-reporter helper functions > inject-markdown-renderer! > injects markdown renderer with all required components
Tests for unified step macro with opts map > step with {:screenshots? true} (ui-step equivalent) > works without *page* bound
Tests for render-http-markdown output > nil and empty data handling > handles nil request headers gracefully — still shows method line
Tests for unified step macro with opts map > step with {:screenshots? true} (ui-step equivalent) > works with *page* bound
Tests for unified step macro with opts map > step with :opts keyword (runtime opts) > supports runtime opts expression
Tests for unified step macro with opts map > step with empty/no opts behaves like plain step > step with no opts executes body
Tests for unified step macro with opts map > step with {:screenshots? true :http? true} (both) > works without browser
Tests for unified step macro with opts map > step with :opts keyword (runtime opts) > supports nil runtime opts (plain step)
Tests for render-http-markdown output > nil and empty data handling > handles empty request headers gracefully — still shows method line
Tests for unified step macro with opts map > ui-step and api-step still work as wrappers > api-step delegates to step with {:http? true}
Tests for allure-reporter helper functions > inject-markdown-renderer! > does nothing when index.html does not exist
Tests for unified step macro with opts map > step with {:http? true} (api-step equivalent) > works with non-response result
Tests for unified step macro with opts map > step with empty/no opts behaves like plain step > marker step still works
